models.ds_description: Most capable generally available Claude — complex reasoning and agentic coding. 1M context, $5/$25 per MTok.
Best combination of speed and intelligence. 1M context, $3/$15 per MTok.

Previous-gen Pro; 2M context.
Previous-gen Flash; 1M context.

Meta Llama 3.1 70B — much larger; needs ample VRAM.
Mistral 7B Instruct — small, fast, broad.

Google Gemma 2 — open-weight, available in multiple sizes.

New class of intelligence for coding and professional work.

Version of GPT-5 that produces smarter and more precise responses.

Reasoning model for complex tasks, succeeded by GPT-5.

An older high-intelligence GPT model.

GPT-5.2 model used in ChatGPT.

Medium-sized open-weight model for low latency.
State-of-the-art image generation model.
Previous image generation model.
Image model used in ChatGPT.
Cost-efficient version of GPT Image 1.
Best voice model for audio-in / audio-out.
Realtime text and audio inputs and outputs.

Audio inputs and outputs with Chat Completions API.
Realtime text and audio inputs and outputs.

Speech-to-text model powered by GPT-4o mini.

Text-to-speech model optimized for quality.
General-purpose speech recognition model.

Small embedding model.
Older embedding model, kept available for backward compatibility.
Identify potentially harmful content in text and images.
Instruction-tuned MoE from Google DeepMind. 25.2B total / 3.8B active per token; 256K context; multimodal text/image/video.
Dense 30.7B multimodal model with 256K context, configurable thinking, multilingual across 140+ languages.
Open hybrid Mamba-Transformer MoE; 120B params with 12B active. 1M context, multi-environment RL training.
